Need To Know.title: Daily briefing: Octopuses’ strange brains might teach us what intelligence really is

Need To Know.title: Daily briefing: AI forces us to rethink maths, says Fields medallist

Need To Know.cluster_lead_title: Daily briefing: AI forces us to rethink maths, says Fields medallist

Need To Know.title: Daily briefing: Trump fires entire NSF advisory board

Need To Know.cluster_lead_title: Daily briefing: Trump fires entire NSF advisory board

Need To Know.title: Daily briefing: The heart’s pumping motion seems to keep cancer at bay
